   route to: 1.1.1.1
destination: 1.1.1.1
    gateway: 172.19.0.1
  interface: utun20
      flags: <UP,GATEWAY,HOST,DONE,WASCLONED,IFSCOPE,IFREF>

       0         0         0         0         0         0     65535         0
